title: SpecEditorOutput
description: Spec Editor output. The agent produces either a field-level rewrite (for ambiguity/testability items) or structural row edits (for decomposition split/merge items). edit_type discriminates between the two modes.

oneOf.description: Field-level edit: rewrite a single field on one spec row.

edit_type.description: Discriminator. Must be 'field' for field-level edits.

spec_id.description: spec_id of the row to edit.

new_text.description: Complete replacement text for the field.

rationale.description: Explanation of why this rewrite improves the spec.

oneOf.description: Structural edit: add, update, or delete spec rows (for split/merge decomposition items).

edit_type.description: Discriminator. Must be 'structural' for row-level edits.

rationale.description: Explanation of the structural change (why the split or merge is correct).

edits.description: Ordered list of row operations to apply.

action.description: add: insert new row after any existing row with this spec_id (or at end); update: replace all row_data fields for this spec_id; delete: remove this spec_id row.

spec_id.description: spec_id of the row to add, update, or delete.

row_data.description: Full row as key-value string pairs. Required for 'add' and 'update'. Must omit for 'delete'.
